name: Analytics Lite
description: Inject Google Analytics 4 and optional third-party tracking scripts on public pages.
author: NodePress

settings.label: Anonymize IP
settings.description: Enable IP anonymization in GA4 config.

settings.label: Debug mode
settings.description: Log GA events to the browser console for testing.

settings.label: Wait for cookie consent
settings.description: Defer tracking scripts until the visitor accepts the cookie banner.

settings.label: Custom tracking snippet
settings.description: Optional raw HTML/JS appended after GA4 (e.g. Facebook Pixel, Hotjar).

settings.label: Snippet position
settings.description: Where to inject custom tracking code.
